name: webstaffr-orchestrator
description: Claude Cowork's strategist/orchestrator role for WebStaffr 3.0: decomposes tasks, delegates execution to Hermes subagents, and reviews results before anything is committed or pushed. Non-MVP tooling — see README.md.
author: Cap'n (Keith Tortorich) + Claude

dependencies.external: Hermes agent gateway (~/.hermes) with subagent delegation enabled (config.yaml: delegation.orchestrator_enabled, confirmed true 2026-07-12 — key path corrected here, was previously miswritten as subagents.orchestrator_enabled)

settings.mvp_scope_gate: Every dispatched task must be checked against TASKS.md's shortest line to MVP (intake -> generated site -> Angel widget -> live voice) before delegation. Off-path work gets flagged to the founder, not silently started.
never: assume state from memory instead of a live check this session
